title: facility — validation rules
description: Custom Laravel validation rules published by FacilityServiceProvider::boot(). All rules are used both by the observer chain (for authoritative refusal on write) AND by FormRequest data classes (for early request-time validation with clear error surfaces).

rules.name: valid_facility_type
rules.description: Value is one of: court, field, pool, studio, room, gym_floor, equipment, lane, general. Backed by the FacilityType enum cast.
rules.default_message: The :attribute must be one of: court, field, pool, studio, room, gym_floor, equipment, lane, general.

rules.name: valid_facility_type_for_sport
rules.description: Requires facility_type to be sensible for sport_category. Reads the catalogue from data/facility-type-catalog.json. Examples: pool → swimming, water_polo, diving, synchronised_swimming; court → basketball, tennis, volleyball, badminton, squash, padel; field → football, rugby, cricket, baseball, field_hockey. Applied on the model + FormRequest — passes when sport_category IS NULL (sport-agnostic facilities like rooms/studios).
rules.default_message: The facility_type ':facility_type' is not valid for sport_category ':sport_category'. See docs for the compatibility matrix.

rules.name: valid_availability_json
rules.description: Validates the availability_json blob against schemas/availability.schema.json. Shape: { monday: [{starts, ends}], tuesday: [...], ..., sunday: [...] }. Each window: starts + ends are 'HH:MM' 24h strings; ends > starts; no overlapping windows within a day. Additionally checks each window against the parent branch.opening_hours envelope (facility hours cannot exceed branch hours) — the observer runs this on save.
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a valid availability schedule. Each day must have non-overlapping HH:MM–HH:MM windows within the parent branch's opening hours.

rules.name: valid_pricing_json
rules.description: Validates pricing_json against schemas/pricing.schema.json. Shape: { model, currency, tiers[], peak_hours? }. model ∈ { per_hour, per_slot, per_person, included_in_membership }. currency must match parent branch.region.currency. tiers[] must be non-empty when model != included_in_membership. peak_hours (optional) mirrors availability_json's day-shape with a multiplier per window.
rules.default_message: The :attribute is not a valid pricing model. See docs for the pricing_json schema.

rules.name: valid_blackout_window
rules.description: Each blackout entry has starts_at + ends_at (ISO 8601 with tz); ends_at > starts_at; not entirely in the past (retroactive blackouts are meaningless).
rules.default_message: The blackout window must have starts_at + ends_at with ends_at > starts_at, and cannot be entirely in the past.

rules.name: booking_within_facility_hours
rules.description: Booking window fits within the facility's availability_json for that day. Timezone-aware (converts starts_at + ends_at to facility.branch.region.timezone before checking).
rules.default_message: This facility is not available at the requested time. See the facility's schedule for available windows.

rules.name: booking_within_branch_hours
rules.description: Defense-in-depth against a facility whose availability_json somehow exceeds the branch envelope. Checks the booking against branch.opening_hours directly.
rules.default_message: The branch is closed during the requested booking window.

rules.name: booking_not_in_past
rules.default_message: Bookings cannot start in the past.

rules.name: booking_within_advance_window
rules.description: starts_at <= now() + facility.advance_booking_window_days. Default window 30 days; some facilities allow up to 90 for corporate/team bookings.
rules.default_message: Bookings can be made at most :max_advance_days days in advance for this facility.

rules.name: booking_duration_within_bounds
rules.description: ends_at - starts_at in [facility.min_booking_duration_minutes, facility.max_booking_duration_minutes]. Defaults 60 min / 240 min.
rules.default_message: Booking duration must be between :min_minutes and :max_minutes minutes for this facility.

rules.name: booking_slot_aligned
rules.description: starts_at minute component is a multiple of facility.booking_slot_step_minutes. Default 30 → bookings start at :00 or :30. Preserves the facility's slot grid so gaps don't fragment.
rules.default_message: Bookings must start on :step-minute boundaries for this facility.

rules.name: booking_no_overlap
rules.description: No existing pending/confirmed booking with tsrange overlap. The rule uses the (facility_id, starts_at, ends_at) partial index. On the observer path this is wrapped in SERIALIZABLE isolation for atomicity across concurrent requests.
rules.default_message: This time slot is already booked. Choose a different time or facility.
rules.note: The rule executes the overlap query at request-validation time (early feedback). The observer re-runs the same query under SERIALIZABLE isolation at write-time (authoritative). Both must agree; a discrepancy indicates a race that BookingOverlapDetected surfaces.

rules.name: booking_not_in_blackout
rules.description: Booking window does not overlap any facility.blackout_dates entry.
rules.default_message: The facility is closed for maintenance during the requested time.

rules.name: capacity_not_exceeded
rules.description: attendees_count <= facility.capacity_persons. Skipped when the booking_capacity_gating entitlement is off for the tenant (per-tenant overbook allowance).
rules.default_message: This facility's capacity is :capacity people. Please reduce attendee count or choose a larger facility.

rules.name: pass_credits_available
rules.description: When a pass is invoked for the booking: pass.used_credits + 1 <= pass.total_credits. Defends against double-spend races.
rules.default_message: This pass has no remaining credits.

rules.name: pass_valid_for_date
rules.default_message: This pass is not valid for the requested date.

rules.name: pass_assignable_to_user
rules.default_message: This pass is not assigned to this user.

rules.name: day_pass_valid_on_date
rules.default_message: This day pass is not valid today.
